contentList.content: Spend an Action to focus on a creature possessing the ability to cast spells, preventing it from becoming <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SNEAKING">Hidden</LSTag> or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="INVISIBLE">Invisible</LSTag> while its magic can be detected.
Holy Weapon Burst has recently been used and Holy Weapon is no longer active.

Three creatures in the area gain [1] and have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Wisdom <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. If hit by an attack, an affected creature has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on its next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> during combat.

Deal damage and attempt to entangle a creature. If the target fails a Strength saving throw, it can't move, <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> against it have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag>, while its Attack Rolls and Dexterity <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag>.
